app.title: ThinkLab
app.subtitle: Train your brain to ask great questions
app.completed: You've completed all challenges! Starting over.

llm.offline: AI assistant offline — using built-in content

modules.whatsMissingDesc: Find the gap in the logic!
modules.chainOfWhyDesc: Keep asking Why to dig deeper!

questionBuilder.instruction: Look at the scene below and ask a question about it!
questionBuilder.instructionYoung: Pick a question starter and finish the question!
questionBuilder.rateOpen: Open question — lets people explain and share ideas
questionBuilder.rateClosed: Closed question — can be answered with yes/no
questionBuilder.rateDeep: Deep thinking — explores reasons and meaning!
questionBuilder.tip: Tip: Questions starting with 'Why' or 'How' are often deeper!

scenes.park: Children are playing in a park. One child is sitting alone on a bench.
scenes.kitchen: A kitchen table has a half-eaten cake, an open book, and a sleeping cat.
scenes.space: An astronaut is floating near a space station, looking at Earth.
scenes.forest: A path in the forest splits into two directions. One path is dark, the other is bright.
scenes.classroom: A classroom where all desks face the window instead of the teacher.

whatsMissing.instruction: Something is wrong with this argument. Can you spot what's missing?
whatsMissing.incorrect: Not quite. Look at the explanation below.

chainOfWhy.instruction: Start with a fact and keep asking WHY to dig deeper!
chainOfWhy.amazing: Amazing depth! You're a real thinker!
chainOfWhy.maxDepth: Incredible! You've reached the deepest level!
